description: When the registering extension is not active, extension fields on registered targets (here, `timeout.notification` registered by laceNotifications) emit a warning (EXT_FIELD_INACTIVE) rather than an error. The validate test does not load the extension, so the field is unknown.

input.source: get("$x", { timeout: { ms: 3000, action: "retry", retries: 2, notification: template("t") } }).expect(status: 200)
